headline: Wells Fargo agrees to $110M lending, hiring discrimination settlement
summary: The bank’s borrower assistance fund “represents a meaningful step toward expanding equitable access to financial services,” a judge wrote.

raw.headline: Wells Fargo agrees to $110M lending, hiring discrimination settlement
raw.summary: The bank’s borrower assistance fund “represents a meaningful step toward expanding equitable access to financial services,” a judge wrote.

headline: Wells Fargo to Present at the Bernstein Strategic Decisions Conference
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, May 19, 2026--Wells Fargo & Company (NYSE: WFC) said today that Chairman and Chief Executive Officer Charlie Scharf will present at the Bernstein Strategic Decisions Conference on Wednesday, May 27, 2026 at 4:30 p.m. ET.

headline: The Fed’s 2026 Cutting Path Will Make or Break PFFA’s 9.5% Yield
summary: The Virtus InfraCap U.S. Preferred Stock ETF (NYSEARCA:PFFA) sits at $21.62 heading into the back half of 2026, paying a 9.5% yield that has drawn income investors looking for something between bond coupons and common stock dividends. PFFA raised its monthly payout to $0.1725 per share for 2026, up from $0.17 in 2025, extending a ... The Fed’s 2026 Cutting Path Will Make or Break PFFA’s 9.5% Yield

headline: 3 Out-of-Favor Stocks We Keep Off Our Radar
summary: The past year hasn't been kind to the stocks featured in this article. Each has tumbled to their lowest points in 12 months, leaving investors to decide whether they're witnessing fire sales or falling knives.
